column1: 「なんで食べないの？」「だって、嫌いなんだもん。」
column2: 「なんでたべないの？」「だって、きらいなんだもん。」
column3: 'Why aren't you eating?' 'Because I don't like it, that's why.'
column4: もの / もん (because / that's just how it is — casual justification)
column5: Sentence[plain] + もの / もん (casual justification/reason)
column6: giving a reason or justification in a somewhat childlike, pleading, or casual way; 'because...' or 'that's just how it is'
column7: もん: childlike justification for refusal
column8: もの/もん = casual emotive because (often childlike/feminine); だって = because (casual defensive); から = because (neutral direct); のだ = explanatory (formal)
